Preconditions: New project created, AGENTIC_GENERATION_ENABLED=true, kickoff questions answered
Steps:
1. Create new project with business info
2. Complete kickoff (answer all questions or skip)
3. Observe builder behavior
Expected Result: Builder calls POST /generate-site instead of runWorkflow(). Response contains runId. Builder starts polling /generation-status.

Preconditions: New project, kickoff complete, no existing GenerationRun
Steps:
1. Complete kickoff
2. Builder calls POST /generate-site
3. Check response
Expected Result: Response status is 202. Body contains { runId: '<uuid>' }. GenerationRun record created in database.

Steps:
1. Complete kickoff (generation starts)
2. Reload builder page
3. Builder attempts POST /generate-site again
Expected Result: Response status is 409. Body contains { error: '...', existingRunId: '<existing-uuid>' }. Builder resumes polling with existingRunId.

Preconditions: Generation triggered, runId stored in builder state
Steps:
1. Trigger generation
2. Observe network requests
Expected Result: Builder polls GET /generation-status?runId=<runId> every ~2000ms. Each response contains status, currentPhase, progress, recentLogs.

Test Name: Progress updates display in UI during generation
Steps:
1. Trigger generation
2. Watch progress component through all phases
Expected Result: Progress component shows phase transitions: planning → settings → page_planning → page_generation → reviewing → finalizing. Page count updates during page_generation phase.

Test Name: Page generation progress shows correct counts
Steps: 1. Observe progress during page generation phase
Expected Result: Progress shows 'Generating pages (X of Y)' with X incrementing as pages complete. Y matches pagesPlanned from response.

Steps:
1. Wait for generation to complete
2. Observe builder behavior
Expected Result: Builder detects status='complete'. Shows success message. Redirects to /projects/{id}/editor within 2 seconds.

Test Name: Editor shows all generated pages after redirect
Steps:
1. Complete generation (multiple pages)
2. Arrive at editor
3. Check page list
Expected Result: Editor page list shows all generated pages (e.g., Home, About, Services, Contact). First page (homepage) is loaded in canvas. Pages are clickable and switchable.

Steps:
1. Wait for generation with some page failures
2. Observe builder behavior
Expected Result: Builder detects status='partial_complete'. Shows warning message about failed pages. Redirects to editor. Editor shows only successfully generated pages in nav.

Steps:
1. Wait for generation failure
2. Observe builder behavior
Expected Result: Builder detects status='failed'. Shows error message with description. Displays 'Retry' button. Does NOT redirect to editor.

Steps: 1. Click retry button after generation failure
Expected Result: Builder calls POST /generate-site again. New runId received. Polling resumes with new runId. Progress component resets.

Test Name: Legacy project uses old workflow flow
Preconditions: Project with WorkflowRun past intake state (e.g., plan_review or generation_running)
Steps:
1. Open builder for existing legacy project
2. Observe behavior
Expected Result: Builder detects legacy project (WorkflowRun past intake). Uses old polling on /workflow endpoint. Shows old WorkflowProgress component. PlanApproval shown at plan_review.

Test Name: Old workflow not triggered for agentic projects
Steps:
1. Create new project
2. Complete kickoff
3. Check WorkflowRun state
Expected Result: WorkflowRun exists at 'intake_complete' (from transitionWorkflowPastIntake). runWorkflow() is NOT called. No workflow states beyond intake_complete.

Steps:
1. Set AGENTIC_GENERATION_ENABLED=false
2. Create new project
3. Complete kickoff
Expected Result: Kickoff completion calls runWorkflow() as before. No agenticReady signal returned. Builder uses old workflow polling. Plan review gate works normally.

Test Name: Page reload during generation resumes polling
Preconditions: Generation in progress, builder page reloaded
Steps:
1. Start generation
2. Reload browser page
3. Observe builder behavior on remount
Expected Result: Builder calls GET /active-generation on mount. Receives runId of active run. Resumes polling /generation-status?runId=... with recovered runId. Progress component shows current state.

Steps:
1. Create project
2. Trigger kickoff
3. Answer questions one by one
Expected Result: Kickoff questions appear normally. Each answer updates businessContext. Skip and SkipAll work. Only after all questions resolved does agenticReady signal appear.

Steps:
1. Complete kickoff with all answers
2. Generation starts
3. Check orchestrator input
Expected Result: Agentic orchestrator receives full businessContext including businessName, businessType, targetAudience, tone, mainOffer from kickoff inference and answers.

Test Name: Network errors during polling handled gracefully
Steps:
1. Start generation polling
2. Simulate network failure (disconnect briefly)
3. Reconnect
Expected Result: Polling continues after transient errors. No crash or stuck state. After 3+ consecutive failures, shows connectivity warning.

Test Name: Chat messages appear during generation phases
Steps:
1. Start generation
2. Watch chat panel
Expected Result: System messages appear as phases complete: 'Planning site...' 'Generated Home page' etc. Messages derived from recentLogs.

Test Name: Multiple pages visible in editor page list
Steps:
1. Complete generation
2. Open editor
3. Check page list rail
Expected Result: Page list shows all generated pages with titles. Homepage marked. Pages are switchable. Each page loads its own sections in canvas.
